chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D – 6321 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Hearing 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 10.02.2026 Ms. Shaista Gul, Advocate along with petitioner Mst. Yasmeen. Ms. Amna Ansari, APG a/w PI Mairaj Anwar, SHO PS Mominabad and ASIP Bashir Ahmed, PS Mominabad, Karachi West. M/s Hakim Ali Shaikh, Addl. A.G. Sindh and Mr. Sahgheer Ahmed Abbasi, AAG. Raza Mian, DSP Legal-II, CPO and Inspector Waheed Iqbal from the office of DIG CIA. Ms. Zahrah Sehr Vayani, Assistant Attorney General a/w DSR Arshad, HQ Rangers, Karachi. ------------------------------------ Muhammad Saleem Jessar, J.:- This petition was filed for seeking protection to the petitioner and her family from the law enforcement agencies and seeking restraining order not to take law in their hand and act as per the procedures of law. 2. Reports/comments filed by official respondents 6 and 8 are taken on record. Official respondents state that they had never harassed the petitioner and his family members nor they intend to do so in future. However, official respondents submit that they will provide legal protection as and when required. 3. Learned Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh and learned Additional Advocate General Sindh submitted that official respondents are legally bound to provide legal protection to all the citizens including the petitioner without any discrimination. They after going through the record, ensure that official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection of life, honour and property to the petitioner in the manner that no one shall cause harassment to him. 4.

Learned Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh and learned Additional Advocate General Sindh submitted that official respondents are legally bound to provide legal protection to all the citizens including the petitioner without any discrimination. They after going through the record, ensure that official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection of life, honour and property to the petitioner in the manner that no one shall cause harassment to him. 4. Learned counsel for the petitioner being satisfied with the statements made by official respondents and learned Additional Advocate General Sindh and learned Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh seeks disposal of 2 instant petition with directions to the official respondents to provide necessary protection to the petitioner and his family in the manner that no one shall cause them harassment. 5. In view of whatever discussed above, instant petition stands disposed of with directions to official respondents, more particularly respondents 3 to 6 to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide necessary legal protection of life, liberty, honour and property to petitioners in the manner that no one shall cause harassment to them. Let a copy of this order be facsimiled to respondents 3 for compliance. Learned MIT-II to ensure compliance. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE
